creator: zaltys@natrix.lt
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #8)

I am trying to copy 8GB file over 1Gbs link and it feels like it panics right away. Small files (few KB) pass ok though. If set nfs mount with rsize and wsize below 64KB (i.e. 63KB), large files pass too, but speed is around 40MB/s only, which is below what AES-NI provides. rsize=wsize=64KB - panic.
